name: types
description: Comprehensive TypeScript type definitions for the entire platform, categorized by domain (Horoscope, KP Astrology, Panchang, Auth).

subfolders.name: horoscope
subfolders.description: Types related to planetary positions, divisional charts, dasha periods, and birth charts.

subfiles.name: ascendantReport.d.ts
subfiles.description: Interface for the rising sign analysis and its astrological implications.

subfiles.name: asthakVarga.d.ts
subfiles.description: System for evaluating planetary strength through the Ashtakvarga points system.

subfiles.name: binnashthakVarga.d.ts
subfiles.description: Individual planetary strength points in the fractional Ashtakvarga system.

subfiles.name: divisionalChart.d.ts
subfiles.description: Definitions for various Varga charts (D1, D9, D10, etc.) for deeper life analysis.

subfiles.name: palnetDetails.d.ts
subfiles.description: Core data structure for planetary positions (Longitude, Retrogression, Nakshatra).

subfolders.name: kpAstrology
subfolders.description: Types for Krishnamurti Paddhati (KP) system including cusps and significators.

subfiles.name: kpCuspsDetails.d.ts
subfiles.description: Definitions for Placidus house cusp positions used in KP Astrology.

subfiles.name: kpHouseSignificators.d.ts
subfiles.description: Mapping of which planets signify which houses in the KP system.

subfiles.name: kpPlanetDetails.d.ts
subfiles.description: KP-specific planetary data including Sub-lords and Constellation lords.

subfiles.name: kpPlanetSignifications.d.ts
subfiles.description: The logic mapping planets to their functional strength in KP scripts.

subfolders.name: panchang
subfolders.description: Daily astrological calendar types (Tithi, Nakshatra, Yoga, Karana, Choghadiya).

subfiles.name: choghadiya.d.ts
subfiles.description: Interface for day/night auspicious time segments (Muhurats).

subfiles.name: hora.d.ts
subfiles.description: Definitions for planetary hours (Hora) and their respective rulers.

subfiles.name: panchang.d.ts
subfiles.description: The primary structure combining all five elements of the Vedic calendar.

subfiles.name: auth.ts
subfiles.description: User and session type definitions for authentication workflows including RBAC roles.
